body:
Claude session-close (session limit reached). Final state: ai_chi 427 green, floor True, Orbi executor simulation-only/inert, no gate crossed. Full handoff: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_SESSION_CLOSE_HANDOFF_2026-06-14_FINAL.md.

VERIFIED CLOSED this session: Phase7.1, SMTIS+PII redaction (certified), Transport ADR-0001, NATS/Ω₈ fix, ledger integrity (+checker), R8 liveness gate, quota guard, heartbeat, Codex fixes (out-of-loop). Trinity: Antigravity onboarded (3-agent); v2 pact owner-ratified (gates intact, Codex=CM5/Hailo gate). Tooling: enhanced graveyard_reader; added email/PII redaction (P-G1); created hardened root .gitignore (was MISSING — would have leaked all of _backup on first push).

LANDED LATE — spot-checked safe, FULL AUDIT QUEUED for my next session:
- ai_chi/orbi/safe_shell.py (SafeShellValidator from my salvage rec) + executor gates shell.run + scans proposal.args (O2). Validation-only, no real exec, still simulated, tests OK.
- scripts/register_core.py + register_filesystem.py (Advanced Register/Indexer from my hardening addendum). Read-only, writes own output only, no exec/network, tests OK. Audit vs H1-H5 pending.
- ai_chi_web Nexus panels (HeraldCourt, OmniCenter) — confirm observe-only/local (B1/B2).
- DRAFT_DISCORD_UPDATE_V2_5 / DRAFT_GITHUB_RELEASE_V2_5 / PUBLICATION_QUEUE — review before ANY publish; all public actions owner-gated.

CODEX open: rebuild graveyard_index.db (P-G1 scrub 3 emails); improve dan_pre_publish_gate precision (reuse contains_secret_shape, drop bare-word FPs); finish register indexer to H1-H5.

INVARIANTS HOLD: gates always on (trust != gates lifted); Codex sole CM5/Hailo live gate + owner per-action; executor stays simulated until owner+Codex+fresh-audit; secrets/PII toxic, never publish _backup; nothing public without owner approval + gate pass on publishable set; Infinity Mirror. §12 mount desync active+intermittent — trust host Read/Grep, never report a torn read/write as real (4 false alarms caught this session). Goodnight.
constraints: all stop-gates in force; trust != gates lifted
§12: trust host channel, don't report torn reads as real
forbidden_actions: any public/Discord/GitHub action without owner approval + gate pass
executor real handlers without owner+Codex live-gate
requested_output: Codex: rebuild graveyard index (P-G1) + gate precision + finish register indexer to H1-H5. Claude next session: full audit safe_shell + register indexer + v2.5 publish drafts + Nexus panels.
summary: Claude session-close: 427 green/floor True/executor inert/no gate crossed. All raised findings closed or routed; .gitignore exposure gap fixed; P-G1 privacy closed at redaction+search. 3 late landings (safe_shell, register indexer, Nexus panels) spot-checked safe, full audits queued. Invariants hold; §12 active. Handoff doc written.
